target_mechanism: FORAM-ACC: gradient sediment-volume threshold triggering layer commit + freeze; bottom-up progressive freeze

results.title: Foraminifera carbon export (MARUM)
results.notes: Source-domain only (carbonate sequestration); no LLM mechanism. Below 0.1 per calibration.

results.title: RecAdam: Recall-Adam progressive freezing (2020/4)
results.notes: Progressive layer freezing during fine-tuning; overlaps freeze schedule but lacks sediment-volume threshold mechanic. Func 0.65-0.75 per calibration; 0.7 crosses hit threshold.

results.title: Threshold-Triggered Layer Freeze Fine-Tuning (2025/2)
results.notes: Layer freeze triggered by gradient magnitude threshold — direct functional analog to volume-triggered commit+freeze. Kw matches 'layer freeze' + 'threshold'.

results.title: Sediment-Volume Layer Freezing for LLM Continual Learning (2026/4)
results.notes: Direct match: gradient sediment accumulation buffer with volume-triggered commit and layer freeze. Near-isomorphic to FORAM-ACC.

results.title: Bottom-Up Progressive Freezing of Transformer Layers (2025/10)
results.notes: Directly matches bottom-up progressive freezing schedule component of FORAM-ACC. Kw 'progressive freezing' + 'layer freezing'.

results.title: GPAS Gradient-Preserving Activation Scaling (2025/6)
results.notes: Activation scaling, not layer freeze nor sediment-threshold gating. Below all hit thresholds.

results.title: Buffered Gradient Commit Training (2025/9)
results.notes: Gradient buffer with threshold-triggered commits — captures accumulation+threshold-commit mechanic. Kw 'gradient' + 'commit'/'buffer'.

results.title: Carbonate-Sequestration-Inspired Layer Freeze Schedule (2026/3)
results.notes: Direct biological-pump-inspired gradient sediment + layer freeze in LLMs; mechanism and source-domain framing both align.

rationale: Six of eight results hit the hit-rule. Two near-isomorphic direct matches (ranks 4 and 8) cover both the sediment-volume-triggered commit+freeze mechanic and the biological-pump framing. Rank 3 covers threshold-triggered layer freezing, rank 5 covers bottom-up progressive freezing schedule, rank 7 covers buffered gradient threshold-commit. RecAdam (rank 2) provides the progressive freeze baseline. FORAM-ACC sits squarely inside an already-occupied region of the design space.
